pom.xml.general_idea: Add wiremock-jre8-standalone dependency for API mocking in tests.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add and configure pitest-maven plugin for mutation testing.
Refine Jacoco plugin configuration with specific exclusions and coverage rules.
Update the Node.js version used by frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16.
Introduce new Maven profiles (wiremock, integration) for different runtime environments.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and explicit sections for better readability.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven build step to compile the application within the Docker image.
Update the container entrypoint to run the compiled Java JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy application source and configuration files into the image to support the new build and run steps.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment, including updated instructions, version info, and feature descriptions.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with new template structure

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project name or context.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default with TypeScript type annotation.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the new @storybook/addon-onboarding addon to the configuration.
Add the @chromatic-com/storybook addon for visual testing integration.
Add the @storybook/addon-interactions addon for interaction testing.
Configure staticDirs to serve public assets, replacing or supplementing previous static asset handling.
Remove the custom WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning and its webpackFinal configuration hook.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Removed import for react-bootstrap-table-next CSS which is no longer used in the project.
Added import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Added imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook.
Added import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Initialized Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL logic to support both localhost and GitHub Pages environments.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added `initialize({ serviceWorker: { url: mockServiceWorkerUrl } })` with logic to detect localhost vs remote host.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Wrapped Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications in the preview.
Refactored preview configuration to use the modern `preview` object export pattern with controls and loaders.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Replaced `export const parameters` with `const preview = { parameters: { controls: ... }, loaders: [mswLoader] }` and `export default preview`.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Adjust the baseUrl in jsconfig.json to use a relative path without the leading dot for cleaner configuration.
Explicitly define the include array in jsconfig.json to specify which directories should be included in the project scope.

Migrate dependency tree from flat 'dependencies' object to nested 'node_modules' structure required by lockfileVersion 3.
Explicitly constrain the Node.js engine version to v20.17.0 in the lockfile metadata.
Update @babel/core and related helpers to latest versions compatible with the new lockfile format.
Add Storybook 8.x dependencies and related addons to devDependencies.
Update @testing-library/react to v16 and associated jest-dom/user-event packages.
Update ESLint and related plugins to newer major versions (ESLint 8/9, typescript-eslint 8).
Add Stryker mutation testing runner and related configuration dependencies.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Update the supported Node.js versions in package.json to include Node 18 and later, ensuring compatibility with modern tooling.
Add the 'mz' utility library as a dependency for promise-based fs operations.

Add the 'natural-compare-lite' library for lightweight string comparison.
Add the 'negotiator' library for content negotiation.
Add the 'neo-async' library for asynchronous control flow.

Add the 'node-abort-controller' polyfill for AbortController support.
Add the 'node-dir' library for directory traversal.
Add the 'node-fetch-native' library for native fetch support.
Add the 'node-forge' library for cryptographic operations.

Add the 'node-preload' library for preloading modules.
Add the 'node-releases' library for Node.js release data.
Add the 'normalize-path' library for path normalization.
Add the 'normalize-range' library for range normalization.
Add the 'normalize-url' library for URL normalization.
Add the 'npm-run-path' library for modifying PATH in child processes.
Add the 'nth-check' library for CSS nth-child parsing.
Add the 'nwsapi' library for fast CSS selectors.
Add the 'nyc' library for code coverage instrumentation.
Add the 'nypm' library for package management utilities.

Update object utility packages and their transitive dependencies to newer versions.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Update prettier to version 3.3.3 to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update react to version 18.3.1 to support modern React features and lifecycle methods.
Update react-bootstrap to version 2.10.4 for compatibility with React 18 and bug fixes.
Update react-dev-utils to version 12.0.1 to support Node.js 14+ and modern build processes.
Update react-app-polyfill to version 3.0.0 to ensure compatibility with modern browsers and Node.js versions.
Update postcss-value-parser to version 4.2.0 to fix parsing issues and improve performance.
Update postcss-unique-selectors to version 5.1.1 to optimize CSS output and fix selector handling.
Update svgo to version 2.8.0 within postcss-svgo to improve SVG optimization capabilities.
Update css-tree to version 1.1.3 within postcss-svgo to support newer CSS syntaxes.
Update mdn-data to version 2.0.14 within postcss-svgo to keep CSS property data current.
Update source-map to version 0.6.1 within postcss-svgo to ensure reliable source map generation.
Update pretty-ms to version 9.1.0 to support Node.js 18+ and improve time formatting.
Update pretty-format to version 27.5.1 to align with Jest 27+ testing utilities.
Update ansi-styles to version 5.2.0 within pretty-format to support newer terminal color standards.
Update react-is to version 16.13.1 within prop-types to maintain compatibility with React 16+ type checking.
Update ipaddr.js to version 1.9.1 within proxy-addr to fix IP address parsing vulnerabilities.
Update bytes to version 3.1.2 within raw-body to improve byte size parsing accuracy.
Update iconv-lite to version 0.4.24 within raw-body to ensure correct character encoding handling.
Update regenerator-runtime to version 0.13.11 within react-app-polyfill to support async/await in older environments.
Update ansi-styles to version 4.3.0 within react-dev-utils to support modern terminal colors.
Update chalk to version 4.1.2 within react-dev-utils to improve CLI output styling.
Update color-convert to version 2.0.1 within react-dev-utils to support newer color space conversions.
Upgrade react-scripts to v5 to support modern React 18 features and Node.js 18+ environments.
Upgrade React core libraries to v18 for concurrent features and improved performance.
Upgrade React Router to v6 to align with React 18 and modern routing patterns.
Add react-hook-form for efficient form state management with React 18.
Add react-query for server state management and data fetching.
Add react-toastify for user notification toasts.
Add react18-json-view for displaying JSON data in the UI.
Remove legacy PostCSS plugins (v7 era) replaced by react-scripts v5's built-in PostCSS v8 configuration.
Remove unused or deprecated development dependencies like storybook-related tools.
